name: Commercial PVC Installation
description: A full 2000sqm PVC membrane installation for a major warehouse in Masterton. Completed in record time with a 20-year Danosa warranty.

name: Residential VCL and Roofing
description: High-performance Vapour Control Layer and flat roofing system for a modern luxury home. Managed moisture movement effectively for maximum insulation lifespan.

name: Aerial Roof Survey - Industrial Site
description: Comprehensive drone survey for an industrial complex, identifying several hidden leaks and structural issues without expensive scaffolding.
